description_long: This is a rectangular juice carton with a predominantly white background and vibrant orange fruit illustrations, suggesting an orange or citrus juice flavor. The front face displays the brand name 'ELDORADO' in a red box, along with the product name 'Appelsin Juice' and additional text indicating it is organic. The packaging features realistic images of sliced oranges and green leaves, enhancing its visual appeal. The sides of the carton are mostly plain white, with one side showing a vertical nutritional or product information panel and a depiction of a glass of juice. The top of the carton has a folded, sealed closure typical of juice cartons, but no visible cap or spout. The overall appearance is that of a standard, single-use juice container commonly found in urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or recycling bins.
description: A rectangular white juice carton with orange fruit illustrations, brand label, and product information, sealed at the top with no visible cap.
description_view_0: The front view shows the brand 'ELDORADO', product name 'Appelsin Juice', organic label, and vivid orange fruit graphics.
description_view_1: This side view is mostly plain white with minimal visible detail, showing the edge of the carton and a hint of orange at the bottom.
description_view_2: The back view repeats the orange fruit graphics and product labeling, similar to the front but with less text detail.
description_view_3: This side view displays a vertical information panel and an image of a glass of orange juice, with some text visible.
